{{CargoRelic
|name=Almagest
|class_id=20371
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Almagest is the work of a Greek astronomer named Ptolemy. It contains two fields of science, astronomy and mathematics. For centuries, it has had a major impact on astronomers in the world.
|fame=14
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=13
|tech=31
|ss1=Snail DEF +10<br>Quantum Amp upgrade B-tad Cost -0.6%
|ss2=Snail DEF +20<br>Quantum Amp upgrade B-tad Cost -1.2%
|ss3=Snail DEF +30<br>Quantum Amp upgrade B-tad Cost -1.8%
|ss4=Snail DEF +30<br>Quantum Amp upgrade B-tad Cost -1.8%
|ss7=Snail DEF +30<br>Quantum Amp upgrade B-tad Cost -1.8%<br> (Awakened)
}}
